name: Cult Priest
description: A cunning cult priest who leads the ritual in the swamp church. Dark energy swirls around them, and they won't hesitate to flee if things turn against them.

attacks.name: Staff Strike
attacks.description: Strikes with a twisted staff carved with profane symbols

attacks.name: Dark Bolt
attacks.description: A powerful bolt of shadow energy

attacks.name: Shadow Shield
attacks.description: Wraps themselves in protective shadows (+2 AC for 3 rounds)

special_abilities.name: Shadow Escape
special_abilities.description: When reduced below 25% HP, vanishes in a swirl of shadow and flees the battle
special_abilities.escape_message: The cult priest snarls a curse and vanishes in a swirl of shadow!

special_abilities.name: Tactical Mind
special_abilities.description: Uses Shadow Shield defensively and maintains distance

behavior.notes: Uses Shadow Shield early if taking damage. Prefers Dark Bolt at range 4-6. Will escape via Shadow Escape when HP drops below 25%.
